arts.ttl: Exeter City suffer disappointing defeat after poor first half performance
arts.sum: Exeter City boss Gary Caldwell lamented his side’s first-half showing as the Grecians suffered their worst defeat of the season away to Wrexham. The lead was doubled midway through the first half when Ollie Palmer ended his goal drought when no-one picked up the big striker from a cross.
